\tzpentry{ID3571}{Vortex Quantum State Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3571 introduces Vortex Quantum State Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \Psi_{\rm vortex}(\gamma)=\frac{\Gamma}{4\pi}\ln\big(1-\cos\gamma\big), \]
